## What's Changed

- Added authenticated playback URLs for every item in the shared Tube TV schedule.
- Replaced fragile stitched channel playback with one independently transcoded movie, episode, or commercial at a time.
- Preserved the shared server timeline so changing away from a channel and returning resumes the program currently scheduled to be playing.
- Retained hardware transcoding profiles and channel watermarks for movies and TV episodes.
- Removed channel watermarks from commercials.
- Added regression coverage for cached schedule URL restoration, authenticated item playback, channel item routing, and commercial watermark behavior.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

No configuration migration is required. Pair this release with Tater Tube player v1.5.3.
